incident_details.description: Host 192.168.10.201 generated 31 'Lateral Move Detected' alerts within minutes, communicating with multiple internal and external IPs including known malicious IPs (111.223.64.11, 149.154.167.99). This indicates a compromised host performing lateral movement and potential data exfiltration.

risk_rating.rationale: 31 alerts of lateral movement from a single source IP to multiple destinations including known malicious IPs indicate a highly likely ongoing attack with high potential for adverse impact.

triage.ioc_summary:
[AVAILABILITY] Saturated interface input/output buffers — High traffic volumes to multiple destinations (31 alerts) suggest saturated interface buffers.
[CONFIDENTIALITY] Changes in network traffic telemetry (known bad IPs/domains), Unknown traffic originating from/terminating on the device — Traffic to known malicious IPs (111.223.64.11, 149.154.167.99) and unusual destinations (e.g., 4.145.79.80) indicate data exfiltration and unknown traffic.
[INTEGRITY] Odd device/platform behaviour — Lateral movement detection indicates odd device/platform behavior deviating from normal operation.
